title: Odeya VerificationPackage
description: An immutable terminal package for one VerificationRun. It binds an exact subject set and frozen assignment, preserves completed, failed, not-started, and completion-unknown paths, and records multidimensional results without granting claim, dispatch, publication, or dispute authority. Lifecycle and dispute state are event-derived; this record never references its successor completion event.

x-odeya-digest-scope.subject: exact retained artifact or profile document bytes
